explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 32 from a base nutrition score of 32. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: good volume for the calories
topPros.explanation: That matters for satiety and general usefulness.

topPros.title: helps add volume without much calorie cost
topPros.explanation: That makes vegetables easier to use often.

topPros.title: easy to build meals around
topPros.explanation: A practical plus because good foods need realistic use cases.

topCons.title: taste and texture can limit compliance

topCons.explanation: Most vegetables are not complete by themselves.

closing.summary: Cauliflower does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best when you want low downside and easy micronutrient support.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want low downside and easy micronutrient support.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
